briefing: Markets were mixed today with NASDAQ down 0.8% while S&P 500 held flat, signaling tech sector pressure and rotation toward defensive names. With only $577 in cash and strategy memory clearly advising against forcing buys on neutral days, holding is the correct call. All six existing positions remain intact — stop-losses and profit targets continue to manage them automatically.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift money out of one part of the market (like technology) and into another (like utilities or healthcare), without necessarily leaving the stock market entirely. Today's NASDAQ drop while S&P 500 stayed flat is a textbook example — tech sold off, but defensive stocks absorbed the flow and kept the broader index steady. Recognizing rotation helps you avoid buying into a sector that institutions are quietly exiting.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從市場某一板塊（如科技股）轉移至另一板塊（如公用事業或醫療保健），而非完全撤出股市。今日那斯達克下跌、標普500卻持平，正是板塊輪動的典型案例——科技股承壓，但防禦性股票承接資金流入，支撐了大盤整體表現。識別輪動動向有助於避免在機構悄然出貨時逆勢追入。

market_education.summary_en: Today's session showed a split market: the S&P 500 finished flat while the NASDAQ shed 0.8%, reflecting profit-taking in technology and growth stocks after a strong run-up. Investors rotated into defensive sectors including utilities and telecom (note T and VZ both appearing with bullish MACD signals today), suggesting caution heading into the July 4th holiday weekend. With no major catalysts to push risk assets higher, institutional desks appeared content to hold gains and reduce tech exposure ahead of the long weekend.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場走勢分化：標普500收平，而那斯達克下跌0.8%，反映出科技股及成長股在前期大漲後出現獲利回吐壓力。資金流向公用事業及電信等防禦性板塊（今日T及VZ均出現MACD看漲信號），顯示市場在七月四日長假前趨於謹慎。在缺乏重大催化劑的情況下，機構資金傾向於持盈保泰、縮減科技倉位，以靜待假期後的新交易機會。
